# GembaBlockchain

> Bulgaria's first blockchain — a public, decentralized, permissionless Proof-of-Stake
> Layer 1 (Cosmos SDK + Cosmos EVM on CometBFT) with full EVM compatibility, built for
> society, not speculation. Native utility coin: Gemba (GMB). By GEMBA EOOD (Varna, Bulgaria).

## Key facts
- Type: public, permissionless PoS L1; instant finality (~5s blocks); full EVM (Solidity, MetaMask, ethers/viem, Foundry).
- Native coin: Gemba (GMB) — a utility coin (cheaper service access, workplace access, tickets, perks), NOT for speculation. Fixed 100M supply, 0% inflation. No liquidity/DEX operated by the project; no fiat redemption.
- Cosmos chain-id: gemba-1 (mainnet) / gemba-testnet-1 (testnet). EVM chainId: 821206 (mainnet) / 821207 (testnet).
- Philosophy: built for public institutions and organizations to deliver services to citizens; founder holds no privileged power; decentralizing over time.

## Live (testnet)
- Explorer (GembaScan): https://testnet.gembascan.io
- Public RPC: https://rpc1.gembascan.io, https://rpc1.gembascan.io, https://rpc2.gembascan.io (chainId 821207, symbol GMB)
- DEX (GembaSwap): https://swap.gembachain.io
- Public registry listings (testnet, chainId 821207): listed in ethereum-lists/chains (the registry that powers chainlist.org, enabling one-click "Add to MetaMask") and in Blockscout's chainscout directory. Merged PRs: https://github.com/ethereum-lists/chains/pull/8413 and https://github.com/blockscout/chainscout/pull/241. These are testnet listings; mainnet (chainId 821206) is not yet launched.

## Testnet faucet & test stablecoins
- Public faucet (chainId 821207): contract 0x2baE94C0463bcdcCD0120A33D90E7fB5b5449584. Free testnet assets per wallet every 24h: 0.1 GMB and 10,000 of each test stablecoin. Claim on the official site (https://gembachain.io/#faucet) or in the dApps (https://win.gembait.com/en/faucet , https://escrow.gembait.com/en/faucet).
- Test stablecoins (6 decimals, valueless test tokens, NOT real): USDT 0x0821EAAE0328b02d6f85C36925acb92E90ef680C, USDC 0x131f3087ecabA6f7ae91439DDaF70f4269D4b9Ef, EURC 0x05003C73FfEC1c2f56021549501Dd7AD850e39C3.
- dApps accepting native GMB + these stablecoins: GembaWin (on-chain bounty/reward contests, https://win.gembait.com) and GembaEscrow (smart-contract escrow, https://escrow.gembait.com).

## Links
- Site: https://gembachain.io
- Builder / company: https://gembait.com (GEMBA EOOD)
- Official addresses (testnet+mainnet): https://addresses.gembachain.io
- Source: https://github.com/ivanovslavy/GembaBlockchain
